name: GOLDENWELL BIOTECH, INC.
business: Goldenwell Biotech, Inc. sells nutraceutical and dietary supplements, including products such as Ji Mai Cardiac Vascular Active Peptide, Double Proline AG 3D Active Collagen Peptide, Cartilage Peptide, Se Plus, and Sugar Master. The company targets middle-aged and elderly individuals, as well as those exposed to pollution or selenium deficient.
namedSuppliers: Australian Trefoil Health Technologies Pty Ltd

exposures.sentence: We are an early stage corporation and generated revenues of only $55 from sales of our nutraceutical and dietary supplements business during the twelve months ended December 31, 2025.
